# Performance Alignment Cincinnati

> Cincinnati's premier precision alignment and performance suspension shop, located in Sharonville, OH. Specializing in track-level alignments, corner weight balancing, ADAS calibration, and exotic/race vehicle setup. Not a typical tire shop — we work on Porsche, Ferrari, McLaren, Lamborghini, and purpose-built race cars.

## About
Performance Alignment Cincinnati is an independent specialty shop founded for drivers who demand more than a standard alignment. We operate factory-grade Hunter alignment and ADAS equipment alongside Intercomp digital corner scales. Our technicians understand the difference between a daily driver street alignment and a track-optimized setup — and we build the latter for a living.

## Ideal Customer
- Track day enthusiasts and amateur racers needing pre-event suspension dialing
- Exotic and luxury vehicle owners (Porsche, Ferrari, McLaren, Lamborghini, Aston Martin)
- Vintage and classic car owners requiring custom alignment specs
- Motorsport teams needing corner weight balancing and data-driven setup
- Anyone in the Cincinnati/Dayton area whose car doesn't fit on a standard alignment rack

## Core Services & Pricing
- **Street Alignment**: Precision Hunter 4-wheel alignment starting at $150
- **Track Alignment**: Custom track-spec 4-wheel alignment starting at $250
- **Corner Weight Balancing**: 3D corner weighting with Intercomp digital scales (±0.1lb accuracy), driver ballast simulation included
- **ADAS Calibration**: Factory-grade Hunter ADAS camera and sensor recalibration
- **Suspension Tuning**: Coilover setup and damper tuning for KW, Öhlins, MCS, JRZ, Bilstein, and other performance brands
- **Brake Inspection & Service**: High-performance brake system inspection and service

## Precision Guarantee
We guarantee all alignments within a tenth of a degree of factory or customer-specified target values. If we can't hit spec, we tell you why and what it will take to get there.

## Service Area
Primary: Sharonville, OH and greater Cincinnati metro area
Also serving: Dayton OH, Northern Kentucky (Covington, Florence), and by appointment for out-of-region clients trailering race vehicles

## Unique Differentiators
- Hunter alignment rack and ADAS system — same equipment used by OEM dealers
- Intercomp digital corner scales with ±0.1lb accuracy — not estimated, measured
- Driver ballast simulation for corner weighting (we account for your weight in the car)
- One of the only shops in the Cincinnati area that works on purpose-built race cars and full slick-tire setups
- No upsell culture — we tell you what your car needs, not what sells

## FAQs
**Q: What's the difference between a street alignment and a track alignment?**
A: A street alignment prioritizes even tire wear and straight-line stability within factory spec. A track alignment dials in custom camber, caster, and toe values optimized for your car, tires, and circuit — typically more negative camber and adjusted toe for cornering grip.

**Q: Do you work on lowered cars or cars with aftermarket suspension?**
A: Yes — this is our specialty. We regularly work on cars with coilovers, custom ride heights, and non-standard suspension geometry. We will tell you upfront if your setup has limitations.

**Q: Can you align a car with race (slick) tires?**
A: Yes. We can accommodate wide-track race setups and slick tires. Contact us in advance so we can confirm fitment on our rack.

**Q: How long does a track alignment take?**
A: Typically 1.5 to 2.5 hours depending on complexity. Corner weight balancing adds time — budget 3-4 hours for a full track setup session.

**Q: Do I need an appointment?**
A: Yes, appointments are required. Book online or call us.

**Q: Do you work on all makes and models?**
A: We specialize in performance, exotic, and race vehicles. We work on most makes but our focus is Porsche, Ferrari, McLaren, Lamborghini, BMW M, and purpose-built track cars.
